extract: Feraligatr (Japanese: オーダイル Ordile) is a Water-type Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves from Croconaw starting at level 30. It is the final form of Totodile. Feraligatr can Mega Evolve into Mega Feraligatr using the Feraligite. Mega Feraligatr was introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
